_comment: R2-ACC-INDUSTRIAL SFTP example. Prefer private-key auth + host-key (fingerprint) pinning. NEVER commit keys or passwords — inject via secret store. Files are archived after success with a .done marker and an idempotency key.

Sftp._authModes: PrivateKey (preferred) | Password (only where unavoidable, from secret store)
Sftp.PrivateKeyPath: /secure/keys/laf-svc (path only; key never in the repo)
